endpoint.label: EP MCP Endpoint
endpoint.help: Base URL of the ExpertPack MCP server (without trailing slash).

apiKey.label: EP MCP API Key
apiKey.help: Bearer token for the configured pack (from EP MCP config.yaml).

pack.label: Pack Slug
pack.help: The pack slug to query (must be configured on the EP MCP server).

embedding.apiKey.label: Gemini API Key
embedding.apiKey.help: API key for the Gemini embedding provider (or use ${GEMINI_API_KEY}).

embedding.model.label: Gemini Model
embedding.model.help: Gemini embedding model. Must match the pack's configured provider on the server.

embedding.taskType.label: Task Type
embedding.taskType.help: Gemini embedContent task type. Keep RETRIEVAL_QUERY to match the server's index.

includeLocalFiles.label: Always-inject Local Files
includeLocalFiles.help: Workspace-relative paths to always inject into agent context (e.g. SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md).

endpoint.description: Base URL of the EP MCP server (e.g. https://expertpack.ai/mcp).

apiKey.description: Bearer token for the configured pack.

outputDimensionality.description: Optional MRL dimension. Leave unset for full 3072d (matches server default).

includeLocalFiles.description: Workspace-relative paths (e.g. SOUL.md) always injected when read_file hits them.
